memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-14 — Trump-Xi H200 CONFIRMED + 8th consecutive API block

- Trump-Xi Beijing summit Day 1: Washington cleared H200 chip sales to Alibaba/Tencent/ByteDance/JD.com. NVDA +4.5% ($235.63), AVGO +4.4% ($435.88). Nasdaq +1.2%.
- AMD MOC (7.67, upgraded from 7.33) attempted 19:44Z — HTTP 403 (8th consecutive block). MUST ENTER May 15.
- PLTR $133.45 — touched $134.48 intraday but closed below $134 support. Score 6.50 — skip continues.
- BTC ~$79,549 — broke below $80K; China summit didn't boost crypto. Re-entry $82K+.
- Iran ceasefire FAILED — Trump rejected counterproposal. Oil ~$107-111/bbl. GLD/XLE geopolitical thesis intact.
- Portfolio +$441 today (+0.44%). Gap vs SPX narrowed from -3.27pp to -2.72pp. Best single-day relative performance since strategy start (-0.06pp vs SPX).
- Key lesson: existing NVDA/AVGO LT positions correctly positioned for catalyst confirmation — captured the move. The API blockage prevented AMD fill but didn't prevent the NVDA/AVGO gains.

### 2026-05-13 — PPI shock + PLTR support break

- April PPI +1.4% vs +0.5% expected — largest monthly jump since 2022. S&P rose +0.69% anyway (tech-led, narrow breadth).
- PLTR -4.31% ($136→$129.99). $134 support broken. Re-scored 6.50 (Technical 3). SKIP until reclaim of $134.
- AMD pullback from $477 to $448 normalizes RSI to ~60. Re-score 7.33 (Technical improved from 5→6). MUST ENTER May 14.
- 7th consecutive API-blocked routine. AMD MOC attempted 19:42:21Z — HTTP 403. Guardrail violation continues.

### 2026-05-01 — Operator-mandated deployment bias correction

- Score ≥ 7 = enter at next routine. Only 3 valid skip exemptions.
